title: Junior Instructional Designer at Delhi University Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Delhi University Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Delhi University Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Delhi University Digital Technologies:
Delhi University Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University Digital Technologies!
